segments.original_text: あれはかなり不幸な事故でしたね

segments.text: Gets pulled toward the back side, and
segments.original_text: 前側から後ろ側に引き寄せられてが

segments.text: just like that, they're already making a comeback!
segments.original_text: という間にもうすぐに取り返していきます

full_text: No way! No way! That was incredibly unlucky! Gets pulled toward the back side, and just like that, they're already making a comeback!
